/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address,undefined -g -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/mesh_uart_transport_stub.c.o "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-master-esp32p4/cluster/cluster_config.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-master-esp32p4/vfs_bridge/cluster_host_vfs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-master-esp32p4/mesh/mesh_host_runtime.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-master-esp32p4/mesh/mesh_host_service.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mesh/cluster/cluster.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mesh/envelope/mesh_protocal.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mesh/processer/mesh_processer.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mini9p/mini9p_client.c.o" "CMakeFiles/pc_master_emulator.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mini9p/mini9p_protocol.c.o" -o pc_master_emulator
